body: [{"ac":1,"text":"`ddx work` readiness/preflight hooks run under a bounded timeout with a clear default and, if configurable, documented config/flag behavior.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":2,"text":"On readiness timeout, the attempt records evidence containing the readiness command/context, timeout duration, and resulting bead outcome.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":3,"text":"A timed-out readiness check does not leave the bead indefinitely claimed/in_progress.","kind":"negative","verifiable":true},{"ac":4,"text":"In watch mode, after handling the timed-out readiness outcome, the worker can continue to other eligible ready beads.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":5,"text":"Regression coverage proves a hanging readiness hook cannot block the worker indefinitely.","kind":"negative","verifiable":true}]

{"rationale":"Only the title meets the lint bar; the bead still lacks a structured description with file:line-grounded root cause/current state, named verification symbols and required gates in acceptance, complete phase/kind/cross-ref labeling, an explicit parent, and a sufficiently self-contained prompt for a sub-agent.","score":1,"suggested_fixes":["Rewrite the description into PROBLEM / ROOT CAUSE / PROPOSED FIX / NON-SCOPE and cite the failing readiness path with file:line evidence.","Add numbered acceptance criteria with specific `Test*` names or unique `go test -run` filters, plus `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./\u003cpkg\u003e/...` and `lefthook run pre-commit`.","Add phase and kind labels, and include an explicit parent field; if there are truly no dependencies beyond the current one, state that as `No deps.`","Add a wired assertion for the timeout path and for the worker continuing after a readiness timeout."],"waivers_applied":[]}
